# madebydia.com

> Diana Park — indie builder, former engineering director, homeschool mom. Ships open source tools, MCP servers, and a newsletter about raising builders.

## Newsletter

- [Raising Pixels](https://www.raisingpixels.dev): Weekly posts on computational thinking, coding with kids, and raising tech-native humans.

## Products

- [12 Weeks of Tech Projects to Build With Your Kid](https://buildwithyourkid.com): Hands-on computational thinking curriculum for ages 2-6. Available on Gumroad and Amazon KDP.
- [Shop](https://shop.raisingpixels.dev): Full product catalog — ebook, prompt pack, conversation cards, unplugged activities, and bundle.

## Open Source

- [chomp](https://github.com/madebydia/chomp): Rust CLI + MCP server for food/macro tracking. Dual transport (stdio + SSE).
- [strava-mcp-server](https://github.com/madebydia/strava-mcp-server): MCP server for Strava workout data.
- [hevy-mcp-server](https://github.com/madebydia/hevy-mcp-server): MCP server for Hevy strength training.
- [oura-mcp-server](https://github.com/madebydia/oura-mcp-server): MCP server for Oura Ring sleep/readiness data.
- [codesnap](https://github.com/madebydia/codesnap): Beautiful code screenshots from the terminal.
- [remember-scroll-position](https://github.com/madebydia/remember-scroll-position): Obsidian plugin that restores scroll position per file.

## Web Tools

- [Toddler Activity Finder](https://mama.dev/toddler-activity-finder/): Search engine for age-appropriate activities.
- [Carnivore Calculator](https://calculator.thecarnivoremama.com/): TDEE and macro calculator for carnivore diet.
- [What to Eat](https://mama.dev/what-to-eat/): Meal decision helper.
- [Tiny Terminal](https://mama.dev/tiny-terminal/): Terminal-themed web toy.
- [Word Train](https://mama.dev/word-train/): Early reading game for toddlers.
- [Shapes](https://mama.dev/shapes/): Interactive shape playground for kids.

## Social

- X/Twitter: [@madebydia](https://x.com/intent/user?screen_name=madebydia)
- GitHub: [madebydia](https://github.com/madebydia)

## Contact

For newsletter inquiries: subscribe via the links above.
For open source: file issues on the relevant GitHub repo.
